title: content/units/unit-NN/practice.json — the unit's slice of the 193-problem matrix

id.description: Immutable and append-only: deep links and future per-problem progress hang off it. The validator checks the unit segment matches unitNumber.

solution.description: Complete worked solution body. No label prefix — the print compiler re-emits '\strong{<label>}' with the default 'Solution N.' or the explicit solutionLabel.

solutionLabel.description: Only when the label deviates from the default 'Solution N.' (e.g. 'Solution (Capstone).'). Stored verbatim without the \noindent\textbf wrapper.

tags.description: Optional kebab-case topic tags, reserved for cross-matrix filtering and search.
